posts.text: CNBCTV18 – 15 May 26 Senores Pharmaceuticals eyes 30–40% revenue growth in FY27 amid product... Swapnil Shah, Managing Director of Senores Pharmaceuticals, said temporary margin pressure in the latest quarter was largely due to the integration of a newly acquired manufacturing facility. He expects profitability to normalise over the coming...
